case_title: MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. VS. DANIEL R. STONUM et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT STONUM, DANIEL R. DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-24-2012
